research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Sotalol is a Class III antiarrhythmic with both beta-blocker and IKr-blocking activity; QT prolongation is a recognized class effect.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: Beta-blocker + IKr framing is common but full multi-current frame is rare. Citations are real but not machine-validated. No falsifier discipline.
